scripts.verify:emitted-commands: pnpm --filter @threenative/authoring build && pnpm --filter @threenative/compiler build && pnpm --filter @threenative/runtime-web-three build && pnpm --filter @threenative/cli build && pnpm build:verify-tools && node tools/verify/dist/emittedCommandGate.js
